title: Feature Reduction Path
description: Build fluency in Feature Reduction inside Dimensionality Reduction by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Value Decomposition
steps.summary: Value Decomposition belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after Q-Value and Value Function. It opens into Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) and Value Decomposition Networks (VDN).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
steps.summary: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after Principal Component Analysis and PCA. It opens into Principal Component Analysis (PCA) in Regression and principal component analysis (PCA) for embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: PCA (Principal Component Analysis)
steps.summary: PCA (Principal Component Analysis) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after Principal Component Analysis and PCA. It opens into Principal Component Analysis (PCA) in Regression and principal component analysis (PCA) for embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA)
steps.summary: Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after Latent Dirichlet Allocation. It opens into Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) Techniques and Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) Topic Embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)
steps.summary: Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after Value Decomposition and Value Decomposition Network.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Non-Negative Matrix Factorization (NMF)
steps.summary: Non-Negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after Non-negative Matrix Factorization and Matrix Factorization. It opens into Non-Negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) Embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Dimensionality Reduction Techniques (e.g., PCA, t-SNE, UMAP)
steps.summary: Dimensionality Reduction Techniques (e.g., PCA, t-SNE, UMAP) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after PCA and UMAP.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: PCA
steps.summary: PCA belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Compare it with Sparse PCA and Probabilistic PCA. It opens into Kernel PCA and Sparse PCA.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
